{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Lemon's acid
| introduced = lh-04-the-pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Lemon's acid]] can eat away at shields and forms a minefield in space.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c30">''The Pilot'', chapter 30</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
